title: Invalid Base64 content error in GitHub Node
symptom: When uploading binary files to GitHub, the workflow fails with 'content is not valid Base64'.
not_this_if: Upgrading to n8n version 2.3.0 or later
root_cause: The GitHub node in n8n v2.2.6 does not correctly convert binary data to Base64, resulting in invalid content being sent to GitHub.
fix_steps: Add an 'Extract from File' node between the binary source and the GitHub node
Configure the 'Extract from File' node to convert the binary data to Base64
agent_instruction: Insert an 'Extract from File' node to convert binary data to Base64 before the GitHub node.
